deals.deal: Tropic Fan Fest: Free 24oz Smoothie Daily with Bowl or Food Purchase
deals.desc: During Tropic Fan Fest, Tropic Rewards members (free to join) get a free 24oz smoothie every day with any Tropic Bowl or food purchase; redeem via app, online, or in-cafe scan.

deals.deal: Free Pint of Ice Cream with Any Pack Purchase Today
deals.desc: Today only (July 24), Insomnia Cookies is offering a free pint of ice cream with any cookie pack purchase, valid online or in the app.

deals.deal: Free House-Made Lemonade with Any 8-Inch Sandwich or Wrap Today
deals.desc: Use promo code SUMMERFRIDAY at checkout online or in-app to get a free House-Made Lemonade with the purchase of any 8-inch sandwich, toasted sandwich, or wrap; also valid July 24.
Wingstop has revived its fan-favorite $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal for soccer season, offering a large order of boneless wings at a bundled price.

deals.deal: $5 Dozen Original Glazed Blueberry Doughnuts with Any Dozen Purchase
deals.desc: From July 23-26, add a dozen Original Glazed Blueberry Flavored Doughnuts to your order for just $5 when you buy any regular-priced dozen or 16ct Minis; use promo code BLUEBERRY online or in-app for pickup or delivery.

deals.deal: Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $9.99
deals.desc: Order any pizza with your choice of crust and toppings for just $9.99, with Parmesan Stuffed Crust now included at no extra charge; available online or via the app.

deals.deal: $5 Faves Menu: Chicken, Tenders, or Sandwich
deals.desc: Order any of three $5 items including 3-piece Signature Chicken, 3 Tenders, or a Chicken Sandwich in-store, online, or in the app; request the $5 Faves offer when ordering in-store.
Get a $5 Your Way Meal with a sandwich, small fries, and a small drink available every day through the Burger King app at participating locations.
Denny's is offering Slammin' Meal Deals starting at $5.99 at participating locations, available all day including late-night hours.
Get any Arby's Slider for $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time; no app or code required.
Pick up a 24-piece Nugget Bucket for $10 or a 12-piece Chicken Bucket for $15 at participating KFC locations.

deals.deal: $5.99 Footlong with Code FL599 in App
deals.desc: Order a Footlong sub for $5.99 when you enter code FL599 at checkout in the Subway app; availability varies by zip code.
